title: I bastardi
writer: Mario di Nardo, Ennio De Concini, Duccio Tessari
actors: Rita Hayworth, Giuliano Gemma, Klaus Kinski
plot: Jason and Adam are brothers who specialize in jewel heists. Jason is betrayed by Adam, who steals his girlfriend, and has him beaten and left for dead. A female doctor nurses him back to health, and he sets about planning his reve...
